chapter_title.en: Chapter on Trade, Its Etiquettes, Virtues, and Jurisprudence

text: 3747 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادُ بْنُ بَشِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "لاَ يَكُونُ اَلْوَفَاءُ حَتَّى يَمِيلَ اَللِّسَانُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3747 - Hammad ibn Bashir narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) who said:
"Fulfillment (of measure) is not achieved until the scale tips."
